Name.en:
Ogham county, est. 1132ic
in the province of Phaaryl
Survey commissioned by
the office of Count Geonor
in the year of 1619ic
Name.zh:
恒历 1132 年前后
法瑞欧行省欧甘郡
由吉恩诺伯爵府邸
于恒历 1619年
委托调查所作

FlavourText.en: Dregs and filth from the Manor gather in silence.
FlavourText.zh: 庄园的污秽渣滓汇聚一处，无声无息。

FlavourText.en: ...intermittent growls echo along the Riverbank, but there is a distant, rythmic sawing of wood underneath it all...
FlavourText.zh: ……河滩边传来断断续续的咆哮，掩藏着虚无缥缈、节奏规律的锯木声……

FlavourText.en: That gargantuan beast, could that have been human once? At least the encampment is safe for now.
FlavourText.zh: 那头浮肿的巨兽曾经是个人类？至少营地暂时能够高枕无忧了。

FlavourText.en: Walls of wood strain against the tide as Death knocks thrice.
FlavourText.zh: 死亡狂潮撞向木栅，扣响门扉。

__col15.en: With the Count dead, Ogham might finally be able to heal.
__col15.zh: 伯爵已死，欧甘或许得到了愈合的机会。

FlavourText.en: A wounded land plays host to an infection.
FlavourText.zh: 饱经创伤、邪魔滋生的土地。

FlavourText.en: ...a chanting that echoes through Clearfell preceding chilling howls...
FlavourText.zh: ……吟唱声在克里费尔回荡，随之而起的狼嚎令人毛骨悚然……

FlavourText.en:
This wolf head seems to hold power even after the Crone is dead.

<white>{+10% to Cold Resistance}
FlavourText.zh:
巫妪虽已不再为非作歹，巨狼的遗物似乎依然蕴含着力量。

<white>{+10% 冰霜抗性}

FlavourText.en: ...whispers of an Ogham scouting party slain by a rogue, their supplies left untouched...
FlavourText.zh: ……据说欧甘的斥候小队遭遇了一名流寇的袭击，他们的补给还完好无损……

FlavourText.en: Better a quick death to an arrow than to see your brothers become the undead.
FlavourText.zh: 干脆利落地驾鹤西去，总好过目睹兄弟们的转变。

FlavourText.en: Hungry jaws hide in dripping darkness.
FlavourText.zh: 一望无际的黑暗中潜藏着饥渴的利齿。

__col15.en: Nature begins to seep back in, reclaiming the spaces within.
__col15.zh: 自然开始收复失地，渐渐夺回其中的疆域。

FlavourText.en: Hungry jaws hide in dripping darkness.
FlavourText.zh: 一望无际的黑暗中潜藏着饥渴的利齿。

__col15.en: Nature begins to seep back in, reclaiming the spaces within.
__col15.zh: 自然开始收复失地，渐渐夺回其中的疆域。

FlavourText.en: ...dirt shifts and murmurs beneath your feet as your move through Clearfell...
FlavourText.zh: ……你在克里费尔中每迈出一步，脚下的土地都在漂移震颤……

FlavourText.en: It is a little easier for the townsfolk huddled between the walls of Clearfell Encampment to sleep now the ground beneath them is still.
FlavourText.zh: 脚下的大地终于重归平静，克里费尔营地围墙内的镇民可以睡得安稳了。

FlavourText.en: A shadow waits and watches with mysterious intent.
FlavourText.zh: 栖居于此的暗影瞩目凝视，其心叵测。

FlavourText.en: ...some swear they have seen the purple bramble that grows throughout the wood move on its own...
FlavourText.zh: ……有人发誓说，他们亲眼目睹，遍布森林的紫色荆棘自己就动了起来……

FlavourText.en: The bramble is still, but the stench of the corpses remains.
FlavourText.zh: 荆棘虽已无法动弹，可恶臭却挥之不去。

FlavourText.en: ...Una mentioned a curious entity out in these woods...
FlavourText.zh: ……乌娜说，森林中有一个古怪的存在……

FlavourText.en: The Hooded One is free but corruption still lurks in these woods.
FlavourText.zh: 兜帽密师自由了，但腐化仍然潜伏在森林里。

FlavourText.en: ...the local witch has not been heard from in weeks...
FlavourText.zh: ……本地的女巫音讯全无，已有数周之久……

FlavourText.en: ...is there no one spared from this evil?...
FlavourText.zh: ……谁也没法逃过邪恶的魔爪吗？……

Name.zh: 阿莉格涅，被遗忘的女巫

FlavourText.en: ...they haven't been seen in a long time...
FlavourText.zh: ……好久没有人见过她们的踪影了……

Name.zh: 阿莉格涅，被遗忘的女巫

FlavourText.en: Another mind lost to the corruption. Better dead than alive in that state.
FlavourText.zh: 又一个被腐化夺走的心灵。与其苟延残喘，不如长久安息。

FlavourText.en: A sanctuary concealed beneath the mystic tree.
FlavourText.zh: 神秘之树下的隐秘圣所。

FlavourText.en: ...they were led here by the stars...
FlavourText.zh: ……是星辰将他们引至此地……

FlavourText.en: Empty chalices confirm that some did not survive the rite.
FlavourText.zh: 空空的圣杯证实，有些人在仪式中未能幸存。

FlavourText.en: Men furiously killed each other in droves long before madness came.
FlavourText.zh: 即使疯狂未曾降临，早有无数人们搏命厮杀。

__col15.en: Though the Eternal Empire lies in ruins, the anger of the oppressed endures.
__col15.zh: 永恒帝国只余残垣断壁，但受压迫者的怒火长存世间。

FlavourText.en: ...weapons and armour still twist and move sometimes. Rumours say a towering construct can form from them...
FlavourText.zh: ……铁甲与兵戈仍会扭转，仍在行动。据说它们会组成一个高耸的构造体……

FlavourText.en: The metal is silent now, maybe this battlefield can finally rest.
FlavourText.zh: 金属已经归于沉寂，战场或许终于平静。

FlavourText.en: A simple ditch becomes a labyrinth when the mind twists upon itself.
FlavourText.zh: 当心智已然扭曲，沟渠小道也是死路迷宫。

FlavourText.en: A simple ditch becomes a labyrinth when the mind twists upon itself.
FlavourText.zh: 当心智已然扭曲，沟渠小道也是死路迷宫。

FlavourText.en: ...the fungus in the twisting vines has a master some say...
FlavourText.zh: ……扭曲藤蔓中的荆棘，似乎也听命于主人……

FlavourText.en: The druid dead but the spores remain. It must be rooted deeper.
FlavourText.zh: 德鲁伊虽已故去，孢子却依然在世。根深蒂固，不易铲除。

FlavourText.en: ...ancient slabs, swallowed by the earth...
FlavourText.zh: ……古老的石板，被大地吞没……

FlavourText.en: Attuning to the runestones confirmed more await discovery.
FlavourText.zh: 与符文石调谐后证实，尚有更多等待被发现。

FlavourText.en: The bootprint of the Eternals upon the face of Ogham.
FlavourText.zh: 欧甘曾被永恒之民踩在脚底。

FlavourText.en: ...driven by madness, twisted by sadness. A danger lurks in the Cemetery of the Eternals...
FlavourText.zh: ……疯狂的促动，悲伤的扭曲，永恒园林中潜伏着威胁……

FlavourText.en: Finally the family can all rest together.
FlavourText.zh: 家人终于团聚，共享安息。

FlavourText.en: ...someone in camp let it slip that there may be jewellery left in the graves here...
FlavourText.zh: ……营地里有人无意透露，园林之中可能还留存着珍宝……

FlavourText.en: The dead won't miss their ring.
FlavourText.zh: 往逝之人不会挂念自己的财物。

FlavourText.en: The wealthy wished to rest in opulence. They failed to take it with them.
FlavourText.zh: 生前富可敌国，死后也图富庶，但富贵无法入土。

__col15.en: With Draven's second death, the spirits of the rebel Ezomytes can finally rest.
__col15.zh: 德莱文二度殒命，艾兹麦义军的灵魂终于可以安息了。

FlavourText.en: The wealthy wished to rest in opulence. They failed to take it with them.
FlavourText.zh: 生前富可敌国，死后也图富庶，但富贵无法入土。

__col15.en: With Draven's second death, the spirits of the rebel Ezomytes can finally rest.
__col15.zh: 德莱文二度殒命，艾兹麦义军的灵魂终于可以安息了。

FlavourText.en: ...a tyrant buried long ago. There is talk he doesn't sleep deeply...
FlavourText.zh: ……埋没已久的暴君，据说他依然徘徊不去……

FlavourText.en: His spirit has been banished, for now.
FlavourText.zh: 他已被放逐，至少暂时如此。

FlavourText.en: ...someone let slip that the original plans for the Mausoleum had a hidden room. Although the plans themselves are long lost to time...
FlavourText.zh: ……曾有人无意中透露，地宫最初的规划中有一个密室。然而设计图早已随着时间的流逝而无迹可寻……

FlavourText.en: Even more treasure than the burial chamber. What a lucky find.
FlavourText.zh: 比掩埋的珍宝还要多，真是幸运的大发现。

FlavourText.en: A time of plague stacked bodies ten high. Now, they roam.
FlavourText.zh: 瘟疫流散，骸骨遍布，堆积如山。它们如今再一次行走世间。

__col15.en: With Asinia's second death, the cycle of vengeance is finally ended.
__col15.zh: 阿辛妮娅二度殒命，复仇的循环终于可以结束了。

FlavourText.en: A time of plague stacked bodies ten high. Now, they roam.
FlavourText.zh: 瘟疫流散，骸骨遍布，堆积如山。它们如今再一次行走世间。

__col15.en: With Asinia's second death, the cycle of vengeance is finally ended.
__col15.zh: 阿辛妮娅二度殒命，复仇的循环终于可以结束了。

Name.zh: 阿辛妮娅，执政官的伴侣

FlavourText.en: ...though tales of her are fewer than Draven, those you have heard sound just as deadly...
FlavourText.zh: ……她的故事虽不及德莱文多，但流传的事迹却同样致命……

Name.zh: 阿辛妮娅，执政官的伴侣

FlavourText.en: A grave destroyed and the owner expelled. Let's hope it stays that way.
FlavourText.zh: 寝宫已被摧毁，主人已被驱逐。但愿现状可以保持下去。

FlavourText.en: ...a spirit bound to a chest. You've been told it won't give up the contents so easily...
FlavourText.zh: ……有人被困在宝箱之中。据你所知，它不会轻易将宝物拱手相让……

FlavourText.en: ...another soul put to rest...
FlavourText.zh: ……又有一个人获得了解脱……

FlavourText.en: ...a lurking boil, filled with evil, that needs lanced...
FlavourText.zh: ……潜伏的脓包，满盈的邪恶，唯有切除一途……

FlavourText.en: ...the land will slowly begin to heal...
FlavourText.zh: ……这片土地会缓慢康复的……

FlavourText.en: Meat wanders the land, ripe for the taking.
FlavourText.zh: 丰美的肉食在土地上漫步，等待着收获之人。

FlavourText.en: ...human or beast? Those who fled the Hunting Grounds say there is something that blurs the lines there...
FlavourText.zh: ……是人还是禽兽？逃离猎场的人表示，人与禽兽的界限已经淡薄了……

FlavourText.en:
The monstrosity is slain but this place is no quieter.

<white>{Grants Two Weapon Set Passive Skill Points}
FlavourText.zh:
聒噪的怪物已经噤声，却没能换来丝毫宁静。

<white>{获得两点武器组的天赋点数}

FlavourText.en: ...a strange altar of wood was spotted among the rolling green grass...
FlavourText.zh: ……无垠的绿野上散落着诡异的木制雕塑……

FlavourText.en: A sign of what might be in the treetops above.
FlavourText.zh: 林冠之上的情况可见一斑。

FlavourText.en: ...rumours speak of an ancient circle of stones in the Hunting Grounds...
FlavourText.zh: ……据说有一处古老的石阵，就藏在猎场的某个地方……

FlavourText.en: An incomplete magic can never stand to true power.
FlavourText.zh: 不完整的魔法，经不住真正的力量。

FlavourText.en: ...one ritual among many on the grounds...
FlavourText.zh: ……此地众多仪式中的一隅……

FlavourText.en: The whispering of runestones has faded from the wilderness.
FlavourText.zh: 符文石的低语已从荒野中消退。

FlavourText.en: Insanity's roost welcomes new guests for dinner.
FlavourText.zh: 疯狂的栖木恭候新的客人上门赴宴。

FlavourText.en: ...the whispering voices. Too many voices! They all lead here...
FlavourText.zh: ……那么多的低语声，太多了！它们都指向了这里……

FlavourText.en:
Was that a man? Insects? One of the trees? Either way its dead now.

<white>{+30 to Spirit}
FlavourText.zh:
那究竟是人？昆虫的化身？树木的同胞？都无所谓了，它已成往事。

<white>{+30 精神}

FlavourText.en: Those on the fringes were the first to draw the ire of the Count.
FlavourText.zh: 偏远之地的住民成为了伯爵之怒的第一个靶子。

__col15.en: As madness spreads, the farmers become the harvest.
__col15.zh: 疯狂仍在不断蔓延，农夫也沦为了庄稼。

FlavourText.en: ...a treasured possession left behind. The same tale as too many others...
FlavourText.zh: ……珍爱的物品被遗落在家，每个人都有这样的经历……

FlavourText.en:
Such beautiful music has been returned to the forest.

<white>{Grants Two Weapon Set Passive Skill Points}
FlavourText.zh:
天籁之声终于回到了林荫之中。

<white>{获得两点武器组的天赋点数}

FlavourText.en: ...the farmers forced to leave their fields say a great evil had flattened the fields...
FlavourText.zh: ……庞大的邪魔碾平了农田，农夫们只得逃之夭夭……

FlavourText.en: If only the entire field was flattened.
FlavourText.zh: 可惜碾平的不是整片农场。

FlavourText.en: ...the abandoned crops here hold secrets...
FlavourText.zh: ……此处废弃的作物中藏有秘密……

FlavourText.en: A vigil of stones surround the newly uncovered rune.
FlavourText.zh: 石阵守望环绕着新近发现的符文。

FlavourText.en: Madness boils over into fire and death.
FlavourText.zh: 沸腾的疯狂化作了烈焰与死亡。

__col15.en: Betrayed, trapped, and besieged, the Ezomytes fought to the last man... then rose again.
__col15.zh: 艾兹麦经历过背叛、困苦和围城，他们拼搏到了最后一人……又东山再起。

FlavourText.en: ...the tools of a great craftsman, abandoned and unused...
FlavourText.zh: ……卓越匠人的工具，冷落而不见天日……

FlavourText.en: Back in their rightful hands.
FlavourText.zh: 终于能够物归原主了。

FlavourText.en: Iron dreams beneath its lid, yearning for purpose once more.
FlavourText.zh: 其中沉眠的钢铁渴望再度担起职责。

FlavourText.en: The slumber ends. The burden of purpose begins anew.
FlavourText.zh: 沉睡终结了，职责的重担又落在钢铁之上。

FlavourText.en: ...screams echo through the village. They come from the direction of the castle...
FlavourText.zh: ……惨叫声在村庄里回荡，是从城堡的方向传来的……

FlavourText.en: One life for another.
FlavourText.zh: 恶人终有恶报。

FlavourText.en: Ancient walls only served to fester Corruption like a swelling boil.
FlavourText.zh: 腐化在远古的高墙中滋长，如同肿胀的脓疮。

FlavourText.en: ...those who managed to reach Clearfell say not all were so lucky...
FlavourText.zh: ……抵达克里费尔的幸运儿说，并非所有人都能那么走运……

FlavourText.en: How can one follow the law when the land itself is fighting against you?
FlavourText.zh: 当土地本身都在和人作对，墨守成规的人岂有一线生机？

FlavourText.en: Paranoia and tyranny go hand in hand.
FlavourText.zh: 偏执与暴虐总是形影不离。

__col15.en: Flesh creeps and blood flows through the crimson heart of Ogham.
__col15.zh: 骨肉蠕行，鲜血奔涌，流过欧甘的赤红之心。

FlavourText.en: Paranoia and tyranny go hand in hand.
FlavourText.zh: 偏执与暴虐总是形影不离。

__col15.en: Flesh creeps and blood flows through the crimson heart of Ogham.
__col15.zh: 骨肉蠕行，鲜血奔涌，流过欧甘的赤红之心。

FlavourText.en: ...servants who once worked in the manor tell of a statue in the church that would turn to look at you...
FlavourText.zh: ……曾在庄园中效力的仆人说，礼堂里的一尊雕像会转头看向你……

FlavourText.en:
There is no safety in a church when such a beast lurks at the centre of it.

<white>{+20 to maximum Life}
FlavourText.zh:
野兽已经登堂入室，礼堂之中再无宁日。

<white>{+20 最大生命}

FlavourText.en: ...behind all this terror. The stories told of his madness are uncountable...
FlavourText.zh: ……一切恐怖的幕后主使。无数故事都讲述着他的疯狂……

FlavourText.en: The head of the manor may be dead but the corruption remains. Nowhere is safe.
FlavourText.zh: 庄园的领袖已经逝去，但腐化的影响阴魂不散。安全已成为妄想。

Name.en:
The Land of Seven Waters
kept in verdance eternal
by the vigilant Maraketh
as seen by the Ardura akhara
of Sekhema Asala by 1619ic
Name.zh:
七水之丰饶圣地
得马拉克斯守望
而恒守苍翠绿意
如恒历之 1619 年
阿杜拉丝克玛，艾萨拉所见

FlavourText.en: Corruption has come to the desert, but these sands have always been red.
FlavourText.zh: 腐化才刚渗入沙漠，沙漠早已遍布殷红。

FlavourText.en: ...howls echo across the barrens...
FlavourText.zh: ……嘶嚎声在荒漠上回荡不止……

FlavourText.en: Only silence lurks now.
FlavourText.zh: 只剩下一片死寂。

FlavourText.en: Brutal restraint makes life in the desert possible.
FlavourText.zh: 残酷的约束让生命得以在沙海中存续。

__col15.en: War taught the Maraketh the difference between pragmatism and cruelty. Peace demands they remember that lesson.
__col15.zh: 战争让马拉克斯人理解了务实和残酷的区别。而和平需要他们牢记这个教训。

FlavourText.en: The fatal weakness of a great bastion is usually one of its supposed defenders.
FlavourText.zh: 坚城壁垒最致命的弱点，通常就是那些所谓的“卫士”。

FlavourText.en: The fatal weakness of a great bastion is usually one of its supposed defenders.
FlavourText.zh: 坚城壁垒最致命的弱点，通常就是那些所谓的“卫士”。

FlavourText.en: ...the tale-women claim the traitor was bound here...
FlavourText.zh: ……说书人坚信，叛徒就被关在这里……

FlavourText.en: ...the traitor, once bound, has now been released...
FlavourText.zh: ……身陷囹圄的叛徒终于得到了自由……

FlavourText.en: The ancient bell chest chimes, whispering echoes of forgotten times.
FlavourText.zh: 古钟之箱鸣响，低语着失落年代之回声。

FlavourText.en: The bell chest lay silent, its chimes unheard for ages.
FlavourText.zh: 古钟之箱陷入沉寂，其钟声已许久无人听闻。

FlavourText.en: Maws of stone threaten to snap shut on the unwary.
FlavourText.zh: 顽石著称的利颚会吞没鲁莽之人。

FlavourText.en: ...the bodies of the Gates' dekharas have been raised on spikes...
FlavourText.zh: ……镇守大门的德卡拉竟落得如此下场……

FlavourText.en: ...the Impaler will rot on a spike of her own.
FlavourText.zh: ……穿刺者终于自作自受。

FlavourText.en: ...claims that the Faridun hero himself led the assault...
FlavourText.zh: ……据说是法里顿的英雄亲自率军突袭……

FlavourText.en: ...the coward fled rather than face another death...
FlavourText.zh: ……懦夫不愿奋战到底，居然一走了之……

FlavourText.en: The flow of trade is gone, but the gates remain.
FlavourText.zh: 商路已然断绝，雄关依然傲立。

__col15.en: The eyes of the banished glare down with spiteful satisfaction.
__col15.zh: 被放逐者居高临下，满眼的怨恨与快意。

FlavourText.en: These rivers now carry only tides of sand.
FlavourText.zh: 圣河之中只有流沙，再无涟漪。

FlavourText.en: ...whispers that Kabala has returned to Keth...
FlavourText.zh: ……据传卡芭菈已经回到了克斯……

FlavourText.en:
...she knew the consequences...

<white>{Grants Two Weapon Set Passive Skill Points}
FlavourText.zh:
……她早就知道后果了……

<white>{获得两点武器组的天赋点数}

FlavourText.en: ...untouched by mortals for centuries at the least...
FlavourText.zh: ……至少有几百年不曾有凡人踏足了……

FlavourText.en: ...untouched by mortals for centuries at the least...
FlavourText.zh: ……至少有几百年不曾有凡人踏足了……

FlavourText.en: ...its left arm would rise from the sands...
FlavourText.zh: ……它的左臂将从沙中升起……

FlavourText.en: Marked by earth, to which all should return.
FlavourText.zh: 受大地印记，万物终归尘土。

FlavourText.en: A place of worship forgotten by the ages.
FlavourText.zh: 被时光所忘却的崇圣之地。

FlavourText.en: A place of worship forgotten by the ages.
FlavourText.zh: 被时光所忘却的崇圣之地。

FlavourText.en: ...where one could once see wonders...
FlavourText.zh: ……曾经满是奇迹……

FlavourText.en: ...now nothing but an empty shell...
FlavourText.zh: ……如今只余空壳……

FlavourText.en: ...if you're fool enough to try...
FlavourText.zh: ……只有蠢材才敢尝试……

FlavourText.en: ...treasure for the lucky, it seems...
FlavourText.zh: ……看来好运之人总能找到宝贝……

FlavourText.en: The Seven Rivers once met below these dry stones.
FlavourText.zh: 干枯的石块底下曾是七河汇流之处。

__col15.en: In her divine slumber, Halani dreamt a thousand happy lifetimes with her son. Her nightmare only began once she awoke.
__col15.zh: 在神性的沉眠之中，哈拉尼梦见了和儿子一同度过的千年时光。梦醒之时，她的噩梦才刚刚开始。

FlavourText.en: The Seven Rivers once met below these dry stones.
FlavourText.zh: 干枯的石块底下曾是七河汇流之处。

__col15.en: In her divine slumber, Halani dreamt a thousand happy lifetimes with her son. Her nightmare only began once she awoke.
__col15.zh: 在神性的沉眠之中，哈拉尼梦见了和儿子一同度过的千年时光。梦醒之时，她的噩梦才刚刚开始。

FlavourText.en: ...Jamanra was not the only one brought back by Corruption...
FlavourText.zh: ……被腐化唤醒的并不只有亚曼拉……

FlavourText.en: ...a tragic reflection of our history...
FlavourText.zh: ……我们的历史在悲剧中重现……

FlavourText.en: ...tombs were rarely left unprotected...
FlavourText.zh: ……这种地方很少缺乏守卫……

FlavourText.en: ...of course it was a trap!...
FlavourText.zh: ……果不其然，就是陷阱！……

FlavourText.en: ...the gods are kind to those who choose...
FlavourText.zh: ……神总是青睐自己的选民……

FlavourText.en: ...go with their blessing...
FlavourText.zh: ……带着他们的祝福离去吧……

FlavourText.en: Certain places of power predate people. Certain places of death do not.
FlavourText.zh: 某些力量之所比人类更悠远，那有些葬身之地呢？

FlavourText.en: ...the lost-men collect many things...
FlavourText.zh: ……失落之民收集了许多奇物……

FlavourText.en: ...the lost-men will not soon forget this lesson in blood...
FlavourText.zh: ……失落之民不会忘记这惨痛的教训……

FlavourText.en: What unholy madness is this?
FlavourText.zh: 这是何等邪恶的疯狂？

FlavourText.en: It is doubtful that was the only one...
FlavourText.zh: 恐怕那不会是唯一的一个……

FlavourText.en: Dark energies lurk among ancient bones.
FlavourText.zh: 黑暗能量在上古遗骸中若隐若现。

FlavourText.en: ...truly the same Mastodon of legend?...
FlavourText.zh: ……那真是传说中的长毛象吗？……

FlavourText.en: ...the rest he earned...
FlavourText.zh: ……这是它应得的长眠……

FlavourText.en: ...its head would keep watch over the deathless...
FlavourText.zh: ……它的头颅将看守那些不死之物……

FlavourText.en: Marked by soul, to fight those with none.
FlavourText.zh: 受灵魂印记，以战无魂之辈。

FlavourText.en: Scraping bones and jagged rock lay underfoot.
FlavourText.zh: 刮擦的骨头和锯齿状的岩石遍布脚下。

FlavourText.en: Scraping bones and jagged rock lay underfoot.
FlavourText.zh: 刮擦的骨头和锯齿状的岩石遍布脚下。

FlavourText.en: An endless swirling vortex of souls calls you forward.
FlavourText.zh: 无尽旋转的灵魂漩涡召唤着你前进。

FlavourText.en: An endless swirling vortex of souls calls you forward.
FlavourText.zh: 无尽旋转的灵魂漩涡召唤着你前进。

FlavourText.en: Forbidden lands hold wonders and terrors beyond explanation.
FlavourText.zh: 这片禁忌之地里满是难以言喻的奇迹和恐惧。

FlavourText.en: ...where the Third Pact was forged...
FlavourText.zh: ……第三盟约的订立之处……

FlavourText.en: ...where the Third Pact was forged...
FlavourText.zh: ……第三盟约的订立之处……

FlavourText.en: ...where the Third Pact was forged...
FlavourText.zh: ……第三盟约的订立之处……

FlavourText.en: ...where the Third Pact was forged...
FlavourText.zh: ……第三盟约的订立之处……

FlavourText.en: They dare enter spaces sacred to their ancient enemy.
FlavourText.zh: 他们竟敢踏入远古敌人心中的神圣领域。

FlavourText.en: For their trespass, they have been destroyed.
FlavourText.zh: 因他们的侵犯，他们已被毁灭。

FlavourText.en: Newly formed crystals hold captive ancient power...
FlavourText.zh: 新生的水晶囚禁着古老的力量……

FlavourText.en: What force is causing these crystals to appear?
FlavourText.zh: 是什么力量导致这些水晶出现？

FlavourText.en: Eons of silence can wear away even the strongest alliances.
FlavourText.zh: 在超越万古的沉默中，最强大的盟誓也将磨灭。

FlavourText.en: Eons of silence can wear away even the strongest alliances.
FlavourText.zh: 在超越万古的沉默中，最强大的盟誓也将磨灭。

FlavourText.en: ...ancient relics forged in primordial fire...
FlavourText.zh: ……始源之火锻造的上古遗物……

FlavourText.en: ...ancient relics forged in primordial fire...
FlavourText.zh: ……始源之火锻造的上古遗物……

FlavourText.en: Only the echo remains, carved in stone and silence.
FlavourText.zh: 唯有刻印于磐石与寂静之中的回音残留。

FlavourText.en: What once shook the sky now lies quiet beneath it.
FlavourText.zh: 曾令苍穹震动者，如今于其下沉默。

FlavourText.en: ...a champion, sent for the Rite of Flame...
FlavourText.zh: ……为烈焰仪式而来的冠军勇士……

FlavourText.en: ...proven yourself worthy...
FlavourText.zh: ……你已证明了自己的实力……

FlavourText.en: To remember the dead, they built monuments the sand could never steal.
FlavourText.zh: 为了纪念逝者，他们建起了流沙无法掩埋的丰碑。

FlavourText.en: ...a dekhara departed for Deshar in the dead of night...
FlavourText.zh: ……那名德卡拉启程前往德莎尔，融入了夜的死寂……

FlavourText.en:
...she will be remembered.

<white>{Grants Two Weapon Set Passive Skill Points}
FlavourText.zh:
……她绝不会被遗忘。

<white>{获得两点武器组的天赋点数}

FlavourText.en: ...they grow fat on the flesh of the dead...
FlavourText.zh: ……它们吞噬腐肉，变得脑满肠肥……

FlavourText.en: ...good riddance to those carrion feeders...
FlavourText.zh: ……终于除掉了食腐的猛兽……

FlavourText.en: None came seeking him, and none remember his name.
FlavourText.zh: 无人来寻，无人记得他的名字。

FlavourText.en: His silence remains. But someone, at last, bore witness.
FlavourText.zh: 他的沉默依旧，但终于有人见证。

FlavourText.en: ...its right arm would guard their bodies...
FlavourText.zh: ……它的右臂将守护他们的躯体……

FlavourText.en: Marked by oath, to protect what once lived.
FlavourText.zh: 受誓言印记，以庇护曾存之物。

FlavourText.en: Countless feet have tread upon these stones... not all of them living.
FlavourText.zh: 无数人曾在这些石头上跋涉……但它们并非都是生者。

FlavourText.en: ...what effect Corruption might have on the dead?...
FlavourText.zh: ……腐化会如何影响先人？……

FlavourText.en: ...nothing dead can be trusted now...
FlavourText.zh: ……即使了无生息，也不令人安心……

FlavourText.en: The dead slowly become one with the wind.
FlavourText.zh: 星月流转，亡者终会与风同行。

FlavourText.en: ...they watch, and judge...
FlavourText.zh: ……她们在守望，她们在评判……

FlavourText.en:
...make a legend of yourself...

<white>{+10% to Lightning Resistance}
FlavourText.zh:
……去开创属于你的传奇吧……

<white>{+10% 闪电抗性}

FlavourText.en: ...what trap might Jamanra have in store?...
FlavourText.zh: ……亚曼拉布下了怎样的圈套？……

FlavourText.en: ...vile dog, violating our Honoured Dead!...
FlavourText.zh: ……惊扰先民，罪无可恕！……

FlavourText.en: The Faridun toiled away for reasons unknown.
FlavourText.zh: 未知的原因让法里顿人呕心沥血。

FlavourText.en: ...a region known for craftsmen of all trades...
FlavourText.zh: ……此地曾以各行各样的工匠而闻名……

FlavourText.en: ...forgotten tools, now in better hands...
FlavourText.zh: ……被遗忘的器具，终于有用武之地了……

FlavourText.en: War does not die. It waits, patient in the dark
FlavourText.zh: 战争永不消亡；在黑暗中它耐心等待时机。

FlavourText.en: Patience is past. Only vengeance remains.
FlavourText.zh: 耐心已成过往，如今只余复仇。

FlavourText.en: To keep their plans secret, defectors were sealed away to die.
FlavourText.zh: 为了保守秘密，叛逃者皆被封堵。

FlavourText.en: To keep their plans secret, defectors were sealed away to die.
FlavourText.zh: 为了保守秘密，叛逃者皆被封堵。

FlavourText.en: ...driven totally insane, and fell in love with fire...
FlavourText.zh: ……彻底堕入疯狂，并与烈火为伍……

FlavourText.en: ...one less terror in the world...
FlavourText.zh: ……祸乱人世的恐怖又少了一个……

FlavourText.en: Foes trapped in crystal, unlike any in the mine...
FlavourText.zh: 困在水晶中的敌人，与矿洞中的任何生物都不同……

FlavourText.en: These crystalline prisons are no Faridun creation.
FlavourText.zh: 这些水晶牢笼绝非法里顿人的造物。

FlavourText.en: History is written in the blood of tyrants.
FlavourText.zh: 历史是由暴君的鲜血写成的。

__col15.en: The Faridun exist no more. All are now Maraketh.
__col15.zh: 再也没有法里顿人，你我同属马拉克斯。

FlavourText.en: ...he swore vengeance on the Maraketh...
FlavourText.zh: ……他誓言让马拉克斯人吃尽苦头……

FlavourText.en: ...all they wanted was acceptance...
FlavourText.zh: ……他们所追求的，只是接纳而已……

FlavourText.en: Those who would be Sekhema had to prove themselves exceptional.
FlavourText.zh: 有志成为丝克玛之人，必须证明自己的卓越。

__col15.en: Wisdom and redemption go hand in hand.
__col15.zh: 智慧与救赎总是形影不离。

FlavourText.en: Those who would be Sekhema had to prove themselves exceptional.
FlavourText.zh: 有志成为丝克玛之人，必须证明自己的卓越。

__col15.en: Wisdom and redemption go hand in hand.
__col15.zh: 智慧与救赎总是形影不离。

FlavourText.en: ...choose your path...
FlavourText.zh: ……选择你的路途……

FlavourText.en: ...walk with surety...
FlavourText.zh: ……安然踏上旅程……

FlavourText.en: Runic weapons abandoned within the Titan's vestiges.
FlavourText.zh: 泰坦遗迹中遗弃的符文武器。

FlavourText.en: ...their scouts sought means of empowerment...
FlavourText.zh: ……他们的斥候寻求着强化之法……

FlavourText.en: Here, Vorana forged blades of glorious blasphemy.
FlavourText.zh: 此处，沃拉娜锻造了荣耀渎神之刃。

宝藏位置与殒命地点

恒历 1619 年

est. year 400bic
preliminary survey
for the future records of
The Reliquarians, 1619ic

约莫恒历前 400 年
史前乌扎尔第 1 版草图
初步调查研究结果
以供守藏者后续记录
恒历 1619 年

FlavourText.en: When the city flooded, the peasants fled quickly... but not quickly enough.
FlavourText.zh: 泛滥之水涌入城，前门万户疾奔逃……却为时已晚。

FlavourText.en: ...the trees move, you best move as well...
FlavourText.zh: ……树木在骚动，你也该赶紧动身……

FlavourText.en: ...chopped down a tree, did you?...
FlavourText.zh: ……不过是砍倒一棵树罢了，是吗？……

FlavourText.en: ...we give sites like that plenty of space...
FlavourText.zh: ……我们通常不会靠近这里……

FlavourText.en: ...never can be sure what killed them...
FlavourText.zh: ……没人知道是什么把他们变成了这样……

FlavourText.en: ...don't be stirring up the Orok!...
FlavourText.zh: ……不要挑衅奥洛克！……

FlavourText.en: ...the Orok will be out for blood now...
FlavourText.zh: ……奥洛克绝不会忍气吞声……

FlavourText.en: Only a small crown of stone remains above the deadly waters.
FlavourText.zh: 一切都坠入死水，唯岩石冠冕幸存。

__col15.en: The last untouched Vaal ruin holds treasures and secrets for the ages.
__col15.zh: 最后一处未被侵扰的瓦尔遗迹，隐藏着千百年的珍宝和秘密。

FlavourText.en: Armies march unseen under the earth.
FlavourText.zh: 地底之下，隐匿的大军畅通无阻。

FlavourText.en: ...haven't seen them in weeks...
FlavourText.zh: ……好久没人见过他们了……

FlavourText.en: ...well, now their silence makes sense...
FlavourText.zh: ……难怪他们毫无音讯……

FlavourText.en: The Barrens hide an ancient secret.
FlavourText.zh: 荒原隐藏着一个古老的秘密。

FlavourText.en: The beacon is lit.
FlavourText.zh: 灯塔已点燃。

FlavourText.en: Ancient Kalguurans sought means to enter Utzaal.
FlavourText.zh: 远古卡古兰人寻求进入乌扎尔的方法。

FlavourText.en: ...they gazed into the pool for answers...
FlavourText.zh: ……他们凝视池中寻求答案……

FlavourText.en: Corruption severed them irrevocably from the future-past.
FlavourText.zh: 腐化将他们与未来的过去彻底割裂。

FlavourText.en: When the end came, the nobles flooded the city to spite would-be looters.
FlavourText.zh: 末日来临之时，为防盗匪惊扰，贵族水淹城都。

FlavourText.en: ...surely, where the canals can be controlled?...
FlavourText.zh: ……肯定可以用它来控制运河吧？……

FlavourText.en: ...finally, Utzaal is revealed!...
FlavourText.zh: ……乌扎尔总算露出了真容！……

FlavourText.en: ...that one has a foul tongue indeed...
FlavourText.zh: ……那家伙满口都是污言秽语……

FlavourText.en: ...she won't be speaking much now...
FlavourText.zh: ……她再也别想喋喋不休了……

FlavourText.en: The Azak revere it, though they know not why.
FlavourText.zh: 阿扎卡族敬畏它，尽管他们不知为何。

FlavourText.en: The second beacon is lit.
FlavourText.zh: 第二座灯塔已点燃。

FlavourText.en: ...we're all still keeping an eye out for Servi's son...
FlavourText.zh: ……我们依然在寻找塞尔维的儿子……

FlavourText.en: ...oh... that's terrible...
FlavourText.zh: ……哎呀……太可怕了……

FlavourText.en: The bountiful fields of the city of Utzaal are now nothing but tangled jungle.
FlavourText.zh: 乌扎尔城的沃土早已不在，百转千回的丛林取而代之。

FlavourText.en: ...you see the silver fur, you run...
FlavourText.zh: ……看到银白的毛皮，就赶快逃命去吧……

FlavourText.en:
...a shame that such a majestic creature is gone...

<white>{Grants Two Weapon Set Passive Skill Points}
FlavourText.zh:
……如此威严的猛兽，可惜只能斗得你死我活…

<white>{获得两点武器组的天赋点数}

FlavourText.en: ...a few days overdue reporting back...
FlavourText.zh: ……报告几天前就该送来了……

FlavourText.en: ...I'll add it to my log...
FlavourText.zh: ……我会在日志里记上一笔……

FlavourText.en: A broken building once housed it...
FlavourText.zh: 一座破败的建筑曾容纳过它……

FlavourText.en: The third beacon is lit.
FlavourText.zh: 第三座灯塔已点燃。

FlavourText.en: ...a runestone repurposed as a territorial marker...
FlavourText.zh: ……一块被改用作领地标记的符文石……

FlavourText.en: A towering stone, threatening those who would trespass.
FlavourText.zh: 高耸的巨石，威胁着那些擅自闯入者。

FlavourText.en: The remains of the Temple of Yaomac play host to countless deadly guests.
FlavourText.zh: 约马克之殿的遗迹里寄宿着无数致命的客人。

FlavourText.en: The remains of the Temple of Yaomac play host to countless deadly guests.
FlavourText.zh: 约马克之殿的遗迹里寄宿着无数致命的客人。

FlavourText.en: ...the source of their vile rot...
FlavourText.zh: ……邪恶腐烂的源头……

FlavourText.en:
...bolstered against the coming darkness...

<white>{25% increased Stun Threshold}
FlavourText.zh:
……振作力气，迎击来袭的黑暗……

<white>{晕眩阈值提高 25%}

FlavourText.en:
...bolstered against the coming darkness...

<white>{30% increased Elemental Ailment Threshold}
FlavourText.zh:
……振作力气，迎击来袭的黑暗……

<white>{元素异常状态阈值提高 30%}

FlavourText.en:
...bolstered against the coming darkness...

<white>{25% increased Mana Regeneration Rate}
FlavourText.zh:
……振作力气，迎击来袭的黑暗……

<white>{魔力回复速度提高 25%}

FlavourText.en: The low and unseen places are vulnerable.
FlavourText.zh: 低洼与隐秘之地最为脆弱。

FlavourText.en: They found no ingress... for now.
FlavourText.zh: 他们尚未找到入口……至少目前如此。

FlavourText.en: What discovery awaits in the Temple of Yaomac?
FlavourText.zh: 约马克神庙中藏有何种发现？

FlavourText.en: The fourth beacon is lit.
FlavourText.zh: 第四座信标已点燃。

FlavourText.en: ...a site of solace beneath the jungle's chaos...
FlavourText.zh: ……丛林混乱之下一处慰藉之地……

FlavourText.en: Runes bolstered the warmth of this humble hearth.
FlavourText.zh: 符文为这简陋炉膛增添了暖意。

FlavourText.en: Beautiful, but deadly.
FlavourText.zh: 虚幻美丽，危机四伏。

FlavourText.en: ...hunting grounds of an ancient beast...
FlavourText.zh: ……远古猛兽的狩猎场……

FlavourText.en: ...truly, the beast is felled? Impressive...
FlavourText.zh: ……真的击败了那头猛兽？了不起……

FlavourText.en: ...been gone over a month...
FlavourText.zh: ……整整一个月过去了……

FlavourText.en: ...as I expected. I'll add it to the log...
FlavourText.zh: ……果然，我会在日志里记上一笔……

FlavourText.en: ...a place of gasping death...
FlavourText.zh: ……喘息的危险弥漫在空气中……

FlavourText.en: ...a lucky fool. Lucky, but foolish...
FlavourText.zh: ……真是个幸运的傻瓜，很幸运，也很傻……

FlavourText.en: Another beacon lies hidden in the jungle.
FlavourText.zh: 另一座灯塔藏于丛林之中。

FlavourText.en: The fifth beacon is lit.
FlavourText.zh: 第五座灯塔已点燃。

FlavourText.en: Stone men move in the dark.
FlavourText.zh: 黑暗之中，石人骚动。

FlavourText.en: Stone men move in the dark.
FlavourText.zh: 黑暗之中，石人骚动。

FlavourText.en: ...locked away, undying, for his horrific crimes...
FlavourText.zh: ……他犯下了可怕的罪行，因此被封锁囚禁……

FlavourText.en:
...should have left him to suffer...

<white>{+10% to Fire Resistance}
FlavourText.zh:
……还不如让他继续受难呢……

<white>{+10% 火焰抗性}

FlavourText.en: Remnants of Vaal artifice still remain.
FlavourText.zh: 瓦尔的神奇技艺依然留存着只鳞片爪。

FlavourText.en: Remnants of Vaal artifice still remain.
FlavourText.zh: 瓦尔的神奇技艺依然留存着只鳞片爪。

FlavourText.en: ...well that's ominous...
FlavourText.zh: ……这可不是好兆头……

FlavourText.en: ...of course it was a trap!...
FlavourText.zh: ……果不其然，就是陷阱！……

FlavourText.en: ...it's risky, but it's up to you...
FlavourText.zh: ……风险不小，但由你决定……

FlavourText.en: ...was it worth it?...
FlavourText.zh: ……这么做值得吗？……

FlavourText.en: Jiquani's workshop holds the last.
FlavourText.zh: 佳华尼的工坊中藏有最后一座。

FlavourText.en: ...an ancient Queen calls.
FlavourText.zh: ……远古的女王在召唤。

FlavourText.en: Death wears a mostly human face.
FlavourText.zh: 死神换上了人类的面孔。

FlavourText.en: ...beware the blood moon...
FlavourText.zh: ……当心那赤红的月亮……

FlavourText.en:
...a good day in the jungle, indeed.

<white>{+30 to Spirit}
FlavourText.zh:
……丛林迎来了美好的一天。

<white>{+30 精神}

FlavourText.en: ...a stone dragged to the bog for ill purpose...
FlavourText.zh: ……一块为邪恶目的拖入沼泽的巨石……

FlavourText.en: The Azak's depravity defiled this runestone.
FlavourText.zh: 阿扎卡的堕落玷污了这块符文石。

FlavourText.en: A waterlogged corpse, ripe for the looting.
FlavourText.zh: 被水淹没的残迹，探索的时机来临。

FlavourText.en: The cult of Kamasa exploited Utzaal long before its fall.
FlavourText.zh: 早在乌扎尔陷落之前，卡马萨邪教便已在此盘踞。

FlavourText.en: The cult of Kamasa exploited Utzaal long before its fall.
FlavourText.zh: 早在乌扎尔陷落之前，卡马萨邪教便已在此盘踞。

FlavourText.en: ...infernal hammering at all hours, echoing from the city!...
FlavourText.zh: ……一刻不停的锤锻声，在城市里回荡！……

FlavourText.en: ...finally, silence!...
FlavourText.zh: ……终于安静了！……

FlavourText.en: ...something glitters across that river of death...
FlavourText.zh: ……死亡之河的对岸，有什么东西在闪闪发光……

FlavourText.en: ...you can walk on it, if your greed outweighs your sense...
FlavourText.zh: ……你可以在上面行走，只要你的贪婪压过了你的理智……

FlavourText.en: Here, all challengers were welcome, regardless of wealth or station.
FlavourText.zh: 这里欢迎所有挑战者，无论其尊卑贵贱。

__col15.en: Not a god, but something else entirely... whatever they may be, Chaos is now watching you.
__col15.zh: 那不是神明，而是别的实体……不管那是谁，混沌都注视着你。

FlavourText.en: Here, all challengers were welcome, regardless of wealth or station.
FlavourText.zh: 这里欢迎所有挑战者，无论其尊卑贵贱。

__col15.en: Not a god, but something else entirely... whatever they may be, Chaos is now watching you.
__col15.zh: 那不是神明，而是别的实体……不管那是谁，混沌都注视着你。

FlavourText.en: ...where peasants and High Priests alike could face the challenge...
FlavourText.zh: ……平民百姓，先贤先师，都将在此面对挑战……

FlavourText.en: ...impressive work!...
FlavourText.zh: ……令人大开眼界！……

FlavourText.en: An ascent into squalor and madness.
FlavourText.zh: 拾级而上，朝见污秽与疯狂。

FlavourText.en: ...I can't even describe what I saw through the spyglass...
FlavourText.zh: ……透过望远镜看到的景象无法用语言形容……

FlavourText.en: ...let's never speak of this again...
FlavourText.zh: ……永远都别再谈及此事了……

FlavourText.en: ...a kind one? I'll believe it when I see it...
FlavourText.zh: ……友善？不亲眼所见，我才不信呢……

FlavourText.en: ...oh, well that was nice...
FlavourText.zh: ……还真是不错的邂逅……

FlavourText.en: Wet stone emanates an inner warmth. Vaal brilliance lies in wait.
FlavourText.zh: 潮湿的岩石，内在的温热，都是瓦尔的智慧。

__col15.en: The last great work of the Vaal Empire still shines within.
__col15.zh: 瓦尔帝国最伟大的杰作中依然闪耀着明光。

FlavourText.en: Wet stone emanates an inner warmth. Vaal brilliance lies in wait.
FlavourText.zh: 潮湿的岩石，内在的温热，都是瓦尔的智慧。

__col15.en: The last great work of the Vaal Empire still shines within.
__col15.zh: 瓦尔帝国最伟大的杰作中依然闪耀着明光。

Name.en: Ketzuli, High Priest of the Sun

FlavourText.en: ...been trapped down there, all this time...
FlavourText.zh: ……被一直困在这里，不知多少年月……

Name.en: Ketzuli, High Priest of the Sun

FlavourText.en: ...good to put them out of their endless misery...
FlavourText.zh: ……他们无尽的苦难终于结束了……

FlavourText.en: A doomed city, full of life, unaware what is soon to come.
FlavourText.zh: 生机盎然的城市难逃灾厄，却浑然不觉即将降临的命运。

FlavourText.en: ...the Fang of the Vaal will defend her city...
FlavourText.zh: ……瓦尔之牙会拼死守护城市……

FlavourText.en: ...disappeared just before her death...
FlavourText.zh: ……在最后时刻凭空消失了……

FlavourText.en: ...for those willing to face a challenge...
FlavourText.zh: ……有意迎接挑战之人……

FlavourText.en: ...you know where to find it...
FlavourText.zh: ……知道可往何处寻找……

FlavourText.en: ...golden idols abound...
FlavourText.zh: ……这么多金灿灿的雕像……

FlavourText.en: ...just imagine Oswald's glee...
FlavourText.zh: ……奥斯瓦尔德肯定笑得合不拢嘴……

FlavourText.en: The Vaal warred not with their neighbours, but with death itself.
FlavourText.zh: 瓦尔人的对手不会是邻族，而是末日本身。

FlavourText.en: ...a simple stab to a heart is all it took...
FlavourText.zh: ……看来只需要戳一下就行了……

FlavourText.en:
...a strange power, but worth the price?...

<white>{Grants Two Weapon Set Passive Skill Points}
FlavourText.zh:
……稀奇的力量，代价又是什么呢？……

<white>{获得两点武器组的天赋点数}

FlavourText.en: ...the use of Soul Cores, to be expected...
FlavourText.zh: ……利用灵核，意料之中……

FlavourText.en: ...what is the morality of using these Cores, anyway?...
FlavourText.zh: ……使用灵核的行为究竟道德吗？……

FlavourText.en: ...they're all about to die, what use do they have for it?...
FlavourText.zh: ……末日已经近在咫尺，留给他们还有什么用吗？……

FlavourText.en: ...that fetched a pretty penny...
FlavourText.zh: ……这个肯定能换不少钱……

FlavourText.en: They scream not in agony, but in ecstasy.
FlavourText.zh: 令他们尖叫的不是痛苦，而是狂喜。

__col15.en: Despite all his inventions and all his horrors, there was nothing Doryani could do to stop the end.
__col15.zh: 纵有千样发明创造，万般可怕行径，多里亚尼还是无法阻止末日。

FlavourText.en: They scream not in agony, but in ecstasy.
FlavourText.zh: 令他们尖叫的不是痛苦，而是狂喜。

__col15.en: Despite all his inventions and all his horrors, there was nothing Doryani could do to stop the end.
__col15.zh: 纵有千样发明创造，万般可怕行径，多里亚尼还是无法阻止末日。

FlavourText.en: ...he would likely be in the depths of the Black Chambers...
FlavourText.zh: ……他或许就在暗胧殿堂的最深处……

FlavourText.en: ...we'll see how this strange new alliance goes...
FlavourText.zh: ……不知道这个古怪的同盟能走多远……

Name.en:
The islands surrounding
the port of Kingsmarch
as described by the
Meridian Free Traders
1619ic
Name.zh:
君锋镇港口
附近群岛状况
依子午线自由贸易行会
描述所绘
恒历 1619 年

FlavourText.en: A rare jewel on the sea.
FlavourText.zh: 汪洋大海中的明珠。

FlavourText.en: They work frantically to feed the angry mountain...
FlavourText.zh: 它们疯狂地工作，以满足愤怒的山峰……

FlavourText.en: ...tortured and enraged for the crowd...
FlavourText.zh: ……为了人群而遭受折磨和愤怒……

FlavourText.en: ...even the mightiest must fall...
FlavourText.zh: ……即便无上神力，终有坍圮之日……

FlavourText.en:
Eaten by the Kin, naught
but a scrap remains.
FlavourText.zh:
被亲眷吞噬，
只剩下一个碎片。

FlavourText.en: One piece of something greater.
FlavourText.zh: 更伟大之物的一片。

FlavourText.en: The Kin were not the only ones seeking sulphite.
FlavourText.zh: 寻找亚硫酸的不止有亲眷。

FlavourText.en: Now only rusted metal remains.
FlavourText.zh: 现在只剩下生锈的金属。

FlavourText.en: They trap and lash animals into servitude.
FlavourText.zh: 它们捕获并驱使动物为其服务。

FlavourText.en: Its body crumples, a force unleashed, now silent and still.
FlavourText.zh: 它的身躯崩塌；这强大不羁的兽物如今归于寂静。

FlavourText.en: The roar within the mountain is no earthly fire.
FlavourText.zh: 山中的咆哮非尘世之火。

FlavourText.en: The kinfolk worship a false god.
FlavourText.zh: 亲眷族崇拜虚假之神。

FlavourText.en: The kinfolk mourn their false god.
FlavourText.zh: 亲眷族为虚假之神哀悼。

FlavourText.en: Dust to dust. Flesh to stone.
FlavourText.zh: 尘沙归尘沙，血肉化岩石。

FlavourText.en: Even mountains fall...
FlavourText.zh: 高山也终将崩塌……

FlavourText.en: The fog hides dangers both real and imagined.
FlavourText.zh: 迷雾掩藏了真实与幻象的危险。

FlavourText.en: Smugglers listened to the voices...
FlavourText.zh: 走私者听到了声音……

FlavourText.en: Now, there is only silence.
FlavourText.zh: 现在，只有沉默。

FlavourText.en: They sailed far, but here, found rest.
FlavourText.zh: 他们远航而来，却在此得以安息。

FlavourText.en: ...he guards his trove eternal...
FlavourText.zh: ……他永恒守护着自己的宝藏……

FlavourText.en: ...the Captain has gone down with his ship...
FlavourText.zh: ……船长与他的船共沉……

FlavourText.en: By all appearances, a paradise.
FlavourText.zh: 表面上看，宛如乐土。

FlavourText.en: ...a maw of ten thousand teeth...
FlavourText.zh: ……万颗利齿的血盆大口……

FlavourText.en: ...won't be eating anyone anymore...
FlavourText.zh: ……再也吃不了人了……

FlavourText.en: ...a monstrous crab fills a cave with bones...
FlavourText.zh: ……一只巨蟹用骨头填满了洞穴……

FlavourText.en: ...we'll be feasting on crab meat for weeks...
FlavourText.zh: ……我们几个星期都能享用蟹肉了……

FlavourText.en:
A warning left unguarded.
A soldier left encased in stone.
FlavourText.zh:
一则未经对待的警告。
一名身化磐石的士兵。

FlavourText.en:
Its message delivered,
it rests in silence.
FlavourText.zh:
消息已传达，
它已得安息。

FlavourText.en: A song so exquisite it can only be heard once.
FlavourText.zh: 一首美妙绝伦的歌谣，仅能聆听一次。

FlavourText.en: ...she sings of a hunger that can never be sated...
FlavourText.zh: ……她歌唱着永不满足的饥饿……

FlavourText.en: ...the isle may finally be safely settled...
FlavourText.zh: ……这个岛屿终于可以安全定居了……

FlavourText.en: A faint hum beckons...
FlavourText.zh: 微弱的嗡鸣在召唤……

FlavourText.en: ...it beckons not with life, but with purpose.
FlavourText.zh: ……它如此召唤，并非因为生命，而是因为使命。

FlavourText.en: ...a cove to make a pirate jealous...
FlavourText.zh: ……令海盗都羡慕的海湾……

FlavourText.en: ...home away from home...
FlavourText.zh: ……远离家乡的家……

FlavourText.en: Where the worthy may earn passage to the Halls of the Dead.
FlavourText.zh: 有勇之士在此争取进入亡者之境的权利。

FlavourText.en: Navali offers wisdom to those who seek it.
FlavourText.zh: 娜瓦莉为寻求智慧者赐予智慧。

FlavourText.en:
Navali offers wisdom to those who seek it.

<white>{5% increased Maximum Mana}
FlavourText.zh:
娜瓦莉为寻求智慧者赐予智慧。

<white>{魔力上限提高 5%}

FlavourText.en: The greatest warriors in history challenge one another eternal.
FlavourText.zh: 史上最伟大的战士们在永恒之中互相挑战。

FlavourText.en: Monkey business awaits at the bottom of the Halls of the Dead.
FlavourText.zh: 亡者之境的地步尽是恶作剧。

FlavourText.en:
Monkey business solved. Step forth to meet the Mother of Death!

<white>{Grants Two Weapon Set Passive Skill Points}
FlavourText.zh:
恶作剧结局了。上前拜见死亡之母吧！

<white>{获得两点武器组的天赋点数}

FlavourText.en: Seek the wisdom of the ancestors.
FlavourText.zh: 寻求先祖的智慧。

FlavourText.en:
The ancestors favour you.

<white>{Grants Bonus Attributes And Resistances}
FlavourText.zh:
先祖眷顾着你。

<white>{获得额外属性和抗性加成}

FlavourText.en: Prove yourself before Hinekora.
FlavourText.zh: 在辛格拉面前证明你自己吧。

FlavourText.en: They still clatter at the bars, desperate for release...
FlavourText.zh: 它们仍然在栅栏前咔嗒作响，拼命想要挣脱……

FlavourText.en: The armaments rest, but the violence they promise never sleeps.
FlavourText.zh: 武器安歇于此，但它们蕴藏的暴力永不沉睡。

FlavourText.en: The steel is gone, but the promise of violence lingers.
FlavourText.zh: 钢铁虽已不在，蕴藏其中的暴力仍在徘徊。

FlavourText.en: ...they still clamour to be released...
FlavourText.zh: ……它们仍在叫嚷着要被释放……

FlavourText.en: ...perhaps they may finally rest...
FlavourText.zh: ……也许它们终于可以安息了……

FlavourText.en: Chains clank in the waveswept darkness...
FlavourText.zh: 海浪阵阵；锁链在黑暗中碰撞作响……

FlavourText.en: Blind to pleas. Deaf to lies.
FlavourText.zh: 对呼唤无动于衷，对谎言充耳不闻；

FlavourText.en:
Her scales weigh only truth.

<white>{30% increased Life Recovery from Flasks}
FlavourText.zh:
她的天平只称量真相。

<white>{药剂的生命回复提高 30%}

FlavourText.en:
Her scales weigh only truth.

<white>{30% increased Mana Recovery from Flasks}
FlavourText.zh:
她的天平只称量真相。

<white>{药剂的魔力回复提高 30%}

FlavourText.en: ...waiting in the harrowing depths...
FlavourText.zh: ……在令人痛苦的深处等待……

FlavourText.en: ...the wretched experiment met his end.
FlavourText.zh: ……可悲的实验品迎来了终结。

FlavourText.en: Corruption has made the Test deadlier with each passing year.
FlavourText.zh: 腐化使试炼一年比一年更致命。

FlavourText.en: ...a horrific abomination bloodies the sky...
FlavourText.zh: ……可怕的憎恶玷污了天空……

FlavourText.en: ...the Karui may climb these peaks once more...
FlavourText.zh: ……卡鲁人可以再次攀登这些山峰……

FlavourText.en: One piece of a lost puzzle.
FlavourText.zh: 失落拼图的一片。

FlavourText.en: Plunder's Point awaits.
FlavourText.zh: 掠夺点等待着。

FlavourText.en: A peaceful enclave of the Twilight Order.
FlavourText.zh: 暮光会的一处祥和飞地。

FlavourText.en: An island claimed by the Twilight Order.
FlavourText.zh: 暮光会占领的岛屿。

FlavourText.en: ...guardian of the heart of Arastas...
FlavourText.zh: ……阿拉斯塔之心的守护者……

FlavourText.en: ...what were they digging for?...
FlavourText.zh: ……他们在挖掘什么？……

FlavourText.en: Religion offers a wealth of spiritual guidance.
FlavourText.zh: 信仰提供了丰富的精神指导。

FlavourText.en: The instruments of faith are valuable indeed.
FlavourText.zh: 信仰的工具确实很有价值。

FlavourText.en: Ruins from a time before Time...
FlavourText.zh: 上古往昔的遗迹……

Name.zh: 本尼迪克图斯，首席使徒

FlavourText.en: ...he proclaims the truth of the New Tomorrow...
FlavourText.zh: ……他昭示着崭新明日的真相……

Name.zh: 本尼迪克图斯，首席使徒

FlavourText.en: ...his head shall adorn Tavakai's belt...
FlavourText.zh: ……他的头颅将成为塔瓦凯的腰饰……

FlavourText.en: Home of the Tukohama tribe.
FlavourText.zh: 图克哈玛部落的家乡。

FlavourText.en: The horizon burns red.
FlavourText.zh: 血染天边一片红。

FlavourText.en: ...blood fever has driven him insane...
FlavourText.zh: ……血热让他发疯了……

FlavourText.en: ...a dark day, but at least it's over...
FlavourText.zh: ……黑暗的一天，但至少结束了……

FlavourText.en: The Abyssals are taking advantage of the terror.
FlavourText.zh: 深渊魔物正在利用这场恐怖。

FlavourText.en: The Karui will not be caught off guard again.
FlavourText.zh: 卡鲁人绝不会再措手不及。

FlavourText.en: Blood fever rages in the flame-cast night.
FlavourText.zh: 血红躁热在烈焰映照的夜晚中狂舞。

FlavourText.en: ...he seeks to build a mighty future...
FlavourText.zh: ……他想成就一个强大的未来……

FlavourText.en: ...almost ended in tragedy...
FlavourText.zh: ……险些以悲剧告终……

FlavourText.en: There may be survivors...
FlavourText.zh: 可能有幸存者……

FlavourText.en: ...a dark and bloody day.
FlavourText.zh: ……黑暗而血腥的一天。

FlavourText.en: Perhaps X marks the spot...
FlavourText.zh: 也许 X 标明了地点……

FlavourText.en: Finders... keepers.
FlavourText.zh: 谁找到……就归谁。

FlavourText.en: ...built atop the ruins of an unfortunate settlement...
FlavourText.zh: ……建在一处不幸的定居点废墟之上……

FlavourText.en: Why did the Knights come here? There was no one left to protect.
FlavourText.zh: 骑士们为何来此？此地已无人需要保护。

FlavourText.en: By blood, sweat, and tears, the Ezomytes rebuild.
FlavourText.zh: 艾兹麦人以血水、汗水与泪水重建家园。

FlavourText.en: Shadows in the night come for the farmers and torch their crops.
FlavourText.zh: 黑夜中的影子袭击了农民，将庄稼付之一炬。

FlavourText.en: ...twin witches, as likely to rip each other apart as they are you...
FlavourText.zh: ……这两位女巫势同水火，对彼此的仇恨与你无异……

FlavourText.en: ...their feud dies with them, and good riddance...
FlavourText.zh: ……她们的纷争随死亡终结，真是可喜可贺……

FlavourText.en: Ancient visitors brought magicks born of the stars themselves.
FlavourText.zh: 远古访客带来了源自星辰本身的魔法。

FlavourText.en: Expedition Detonator
FlavourText.zh: 先祖秘藏引爆器

FlavourText.en: Expedition Detonated
FlavourText.zh: 先祖秘藏已引爆

FlavourText.en: ...a dark presence, lurking among the stones...
FlavourText.zh: ……黑暗的身影蛰伏于乱石间……

FlavourText.en: ...light returns to the Stones of Serle...
FlavourText.zh: ……瑟尔之石重沐光明……

FlavourText.en: The humming of the runes draws them like moths to the flame...
FlavourText.zh: 符文的嗡鸣吸引着它们，一如飞蛾扑火……

FlavourText.en: Ogham is safe... at the moment.
FlavourText.zh: 欧甘安全了……至少目前如此。

FlavourText.en: Fell darkness shrouds the once vibrant wood.
FlavourText.zh: 黑暗阴影笼罩着曾经生机勃勃的树林。

FlavourText.en: Shadows whisper of things to come.
FlavourText.zh: 阴影低语着将至之事。

FlavourText.en: One portent remains.
FlavourText.zh: 预兆尚存其一。

FlavourText.en: Silence has fallen over the Blackwood.
FlavourText.zh: 黑木林万籁俱寂。

FlavourText.en: The fallen Thane and Lady of Holten serve a dark master.
FlavourText.zh: 霍尔顿堕落的领主与夫人，侍奉着一个黑暗的主人。

FlavourText.en: ...sentinels of a dark faith...
FlavourText.zh: ……黑暗信仰的守卫者……

FlavourText.en: ...hope has returned to Holten...
FlavourText.zh: ……希望重返霍尔顿……

FlavourText.en: A dark visitor seeks coins.
FlavourText.zh: 索要银币的幽冥访客。

FlavourText.en: A trade was made, a deal sealed.
FlavourText.zh: 交易既成，契约已缔。

FlavourText.en: Built in honour of a Great Thane, but now sullying his memory.
FlavourText.zh: 为纪念伟大领主而建，如今却玷污了他的记忆。

FlavourText.en: ...a merciless mauler of innocent and guilty alike...
FlavourText.zh: ……这位冷血的施暴者对犯罪者和无辜之人一视同仁……

FlavourText.en:
...justice was better than he deserved...

<white>{Grants Two Weapon Set Passive Skill Points}
FlavourText.zh:
……这般审判已算宽宥……

<white>{获得 2 点武器组天赋点}

FlavourText.en: The grounds of the Estate have seen nothing but death of late.
FlavourText.zh: 庄园的地界近来只见死亡。

Name.zh: 领主乌弗瑞克和艾尔斯威丝女士

FlavourText.en: ...led their people into madness...
FlavourText.zh: ……将子民引向癫狂……

Name.zh: 领主乌弗瑞克和艾尔斯威丝女士

FlavourText.en: ...perhaps now, Holten can rebuild...
FlavourText.zh: ……或许此刻，霍尔顿得以重建……

FlavourText.en: Once a wondrous market, now a desolate shell.
FlavourText.zh: 曾是一座奇妙的市集，如今已成荒凉的空壳。

FlavourText.en: Barren and dry, its purpose is long forgotten in the sands.
FlavourText.zh: 荒芜干涸，它的使命早已被黄沙掩埋。

FlavourText.en: ...fell beasts ravage those who cross...
FlavourText.zh: ……凶兽肆虐噬咬过路之人……

FlavourText.en: ...the akharas may now reach us...
FlavourText.zh: ……阿卡拉而今可抵此域……

FlavourText.en: Some still remember their ancient promises.
FlavourText.zh: 仍有铭记古老誓约之人。

FlavourText.en:
The Molten One stands with humanity.

<white>{5% increased Maximum Life}
FlavourText.zh:
熔岩者与人类站在同一阵线。

<white>{生命上限提高 5%}

FlavourText.en: In the distance, someone shouts for help.
FlavourText.zh: 远处传来呼救声。

FlavourText.en: Torbik lives to trade another day.
FlavourText.zh: 托尔比克活着继续行商之路。

FlavourText.en: Bubbling mud oozes and drowns any who step near.
FlavourText.zh: 汩汩涌出的泥浆，溺毙了所有靠近之人。

FlavourText.en: Expedition Detonator
FlavourText.zh: 先祖秘藏引爆器

FlavourText.en: Expedition Detonated
FlavourText.zh: 先祖秘藏已引爆

FlavourText.en: The water guardians have served valiantly for generations.
FlavourText.zh: 水卫世代英勇服役。

FlavourText.en: ...promised glory by Azmadi...
FlavourText.zh: ……阿兹马迪许诺的荣光……

FlavourText.en: ...the Serpent Clan suffers another loss...
FlavourText.zh: ……蛇族再遭重创……

FlavourText.en: Two Djinn must be returned to their rightful places.
FlavourText.zh: 两位巨灵必须回到该去的地方。

FlavourText.en: One more Djinn must be returned to their rightful place.
FlavourText.zh: 还有一位巨灵必须回到该去的地方。

FlavourText.en: The Sel Khari Sanctuary has been made whole.
FlavourText.zh: 塞卡莉圣所已复完整。

FlavourText.en: The fifth river is but a distant memory on tale-women's tongues.
FlavourText.zh: 第五大河只是说书人口中的遥远记忆。

FlavourText.en: ...Faridun magic summoned something beyond control...
FlavourText.zh: ……法里顿的魔法召唤出无法控制的事物……

FlavourText.en: ...the Flame is now ash...
FlavourText.zh: ……火焰只剩下灰烬……

FlavourText.en: Long have they dreamed of vengeance against the Maraketh.
FlavourText.zh: 他们长久以来梦想着向马拉克斯人复仇。

FlavourText.en: Their dreams of vengeance will have to wait.
FlavourText.zh: 他们的复仇之梦只能暂且搁置。

FlavourText.en: The populace would gather to share tales and wine.
FlavourText.zh: 民众曾聚集于此分享故事与美酒。

FlavourText.en: Choose, and be graced.
FlavourText.zh: 抉择吧，蒙受恩泽。

FlavourText.en:
Received Tabana's Boon
<white>{+5% to [ElementalDamage|Elemental] [Resistances|Resistances]}
FlavourText.zh:
获得塔巴纳的恩赐
<white>{+5% [ElementalDamage|元素][Resistances|抗性]}

FlavourText.en:
Received Orbala's Boon
<white>{3% increased Movement Speed}
FlavourText.zh:
获得欧巴拉的恩赐
<white>{移动速度提高 3%}

FlavourText.en:
Received Ahkeli's Boon
<white>{15% increased Global [Armour], [Evasion] and [EnergyShield|Energy Shield]}
FlavourText.zh:
获得阿克莱的恩赐
<white>{全局[Armour|护甲], [Evasion|闪避]和[EnergyShield|能量护盾]提高 15%}

FlavourText.en:
Received Galai's Boon
<white>{20% increased [Presence|Presence] Area of Effect}
FlavourText.zh:
获得加莱的恩赐
<white>{[Presence|在场]效果范围提高 20%}

FlavourText.en:
Received Halani's Boon
<white>{12% increased [CooldownRecovery|Cooldown Recovery Rate]}
FlavourText.zh:
获得哈拉尼的恩赐
<white>{[CooldownRecovery|冷却回复速度]加快 12%}

FlavourText.en:
Received Kochai's Boon
<white>{+5 to all [Attributes|Attributes]}
FlavourText.zh:
获得柯察伊的恩赐
<white>{+5 全[Attributes|属性]}

FlavourText.en:
Received Alima's Disgrace
<white>{5% increased Experience Gain}
<corrupted>{-5% to [ElementalDamage|Elemental] [Resistances|Resistances]
3% reduced Movement Speed
15% reduced Global [Armour], [Evasion] and [EnergyShield|Energy Shield]
20% reduced [Presence|Presence] Area of Effect
12% reduced [CooldownRecovery|Cooldown Recovery Rate]
5% reduced [Attributes|Attributes]}
FlavourText.zh:
获得阿莉玛的耻辱
<white>{经验值获得提高 5%}
<corrupted>{-5% [ElementalDamage|元素][Resistances|抗性]
移动速度降低 3%
全局[Armour|护甲], [Evasion|闪避]和[EnergyShield|能量护盾]降低 15%
[Presence|在场]效果范围缩小 20%
[CooldownRecovery|冷却回复速度]降低 12%
[Attributes|属性]降低 5%}

FlavourText.en: As the water of Qimah ran low, other methods were required to refill it...
FlavourText.zh: 当奇玛尔的水位下降时，需要其他方法来补充……

FlavourText.en: Give your water to future generations...
FlavourText.zh: 将你的水给予后代……

FlavourText.en: Guard the future with a gift of water...
FlavourText.zh: 以馈赠之水守护未来……

FlavourText.en: Those who came before now give back.
FlavourText.zh: 先辈如今回馈后人。

FlavourText.en: Hope remains in the Vastiri.
FlavourText.zh: 瓦斯提里希望长存。

FlavourText.en: ...Corrupted water, sealed away...
FlavourText.zh: ……被污染的水，被封存起来……

FlavourText.en: ...finally purified...
FlavourText.zh: ……终于得以净化……

FlavourText.en: ...seeks to disrupt the Gifting of Water...
FlavourText.zh: ……企图干预圣水赐福仪式……

FlavourText.en: ...another dead pretender...
FlavourText.zh: ……另一个冒牌货死了……

FlavourText.en: At the base of the mountain, travellers stopped here for respite.
FlavourText.zh: 山脚下，旅人们在此停留休憩。

FlavourText.en: Drink in the mountain beyond and hunt your fill.
FlavourText.zh: 饮下远山的气息，尽情狩猎。

FlavourText.en: A horned snake bears a sword...
FlavourText.zh: 一条长角的蛇背负着剑……

FlavourText.en: ...the past lies forgotten.
FlavourText.zh: ……过去已被遗忘。

FlavourText.en: What more remains unknown?
FlavourText.zh: 还有多少未知之事？

FlavourText.en: A beacon is lit among the trees.
FlavourText.zh: 一座灯塔在树丛中被点燃。

FlavourText.en: Home to displaced Azmeri, now fallen.
FlavourText.zh: 曾是流离失所的阿兹莫里人的家园，如今已然衰败。

FlavourText.en: ...went mad from whispered voices...
FlavourText.zh: ……因低语而陷入癫狂……

FlavourText.en:
...a tragic tale, deceived by the Snake...

<white>{+40 to Spirit}
FlavourText.zh:
……一个受蛇蛊惑的悲剧……

<white>{+40 精魂}

FlavourText.en: They will show you the way.
FlavourText.zh: 它们会为你指引道路。

FlavourText.en: Follow the wisps.
FlavourText.zh: 跟着鬼灵走。

FlavourText.en: The mysterious wisps have moved on.
FlavourText.zh: 神秘的鬼灵离开了。

FlavourText.en: With the Azmeri gone, Abyssals rise where they would not before.
FlavourText.zh: 随着阿兹莫里人的离去，深渊魔物在以往不曾出现的地方崛起。

FlavourText.en: What drives the Abyssals? Perhaps mortals cannot know.
FlavourText.zh: 是什么驱使着深渊魔物？或许凡人无从知晓。

FlavourText.en: The Azmeri and the Vaal held strong ties.
FlavourText.zh: 阿兹莫里人与瓦尔人曾有着紧密的联系。

FlavourText.en: A beacon is lit in the abandoned village.
FlavourText.zh: 一座灯塔在废弃村庄中被点燃。

FlavourText.en: In the basin of Mount Kriar, great glacial ice reflects your fate.
FlavourText.zh: 在克里亚山盆地中，巨大的冰川映照着你的命运。

FlavourText.en: Expedition Detonator
FlavourText.zh: 先祖秘藏引爆器

FlavourText.en: Expedition Detonated
FlavourText.zh: 先祖秘藏已引爆

FlavourText.en: ...it rides the icy gales in search of prey...
FlavourText.zh: ……它乘驭凛冽朔风巡猎猎物……

FlavourText.en: ...we need no longer fear the blizzard...
FlavourText.zh: ……我们终不再畏惧暴风雪……

FlavourText.en: This place was not always so cold.
FlavourText.zh: 此地并非一直如此寒冷。

FlavourText.en: A beacon is lit on the icy slopes.
FlavourText.zh: 一座灯塔在冰封的山坡上被点燃。

FlavourText.en: The caves can be heard, even against the ferocious winds.
FlavourText.zh: 即使狂风呼啸，洞穴的声响仍清晰可闻。

FlavourText.en: ...the beast of legend, the beast that howls...
FlavourText.zh: ……传说巨兽，长嗥之兽……

FlavourText.en:
...the mountains are finally safe...

<white>{Grants Two Weapon Set Passive Skill Points}
FlavourText.zh:
……群山终得安宁……

<white>{获得两点武器组的天赋点数}

FlavourText.en: The wind still carries an echo of a call...
FlavourText.zh: 风中仍回荡着呼唤的余音……

FlavourText.en: A beacon is lit in caves most foul.
FlavourText.zh: 一座灯塔在最污秽的洞穴中被点燃。

FlavourText.en: The Vaal left their mark at the top of the world.
FlavourText.zh: 瓦尔人在世界之巅留下了他们的印记。

FlavourText.en: He watches from on high, waiting.
FlavourText.zh: 他在高处监视着，等待着。

FlavourText.en: The gift has been given.
FlavourText.zh: 馈赠已然赐下。

FlavourText.en: The Vaal were here for a reason...
FlavourText.zh: 瓦尔人来此必有原因……

FlavourText.en: A beacon is lit on the highest peaks.
FlavourText.zh: 一座灯塔在最高的山巅被点燃。

FlavourText.en: The Architect of Expansion cut his way into the mountainside.
FlavourText.zh: 扩充建筑师在山腰上开辟了道路。

FlavourText.en: ...one does not simply walk into the Vault...
FlavourText.zh: ……宝库不是任何人可以随意进出……

FlavourText.en: ...the way is open...
FlavourText.zh: ……现在任你通行……

FlavourText.en: Uromoti's beacon remains.
FlavourText.zh: 武罗摩提的灯塔依然存在。

FlavourText.en: ...the Queen calls once more.
FlavourText.zh: ……女王再次呼唤。

FlavourText.en: Deep within the vault, the Vaal lived on in solitude.
FlavourText.zh: 在宝库的深处，瓦尔人孤独地生存着。

FlavourText.en: Vaults within vaults...
FlavourText.zh: 宝库里还有宝库……

FlavourText.en: Loot quickly, lest they discover your treachery.
FlavourText.zh: 在他们发现你的计谋前，快点搜刮吧。

FlavourText.en: The Cuachic Vault provided many things...
FlavourText.zh: 库阿奇克宝库里很多好东西……

FlavourText.en: The Blood Twins will not bow so easily.
FlavourText.zh: 血之双子不会轻易低头。

FlavourText.en: The Cuachic now recognise Doryani's authority.
FlavourText.zh: 库阿奇克认识到了多里亚尼的权威。

FlavourText.en: There is no failure. Only shifting definitions of success.
FlavourText.zh: 失败并不存在，只是成功的定义变化无常。
